argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const target = '{{ target }}'; let targetKind = 'answer'; let questionId = null; let answerId = null; let targetUrl = target; if (target.startsWith('answer:')) { const match = target.match(/answer:(\d+):(\d+)/); questionId = match ? match[1] : null; answerId = match ? match[2] : null; targetUrl = 'https://www.zhihu.com/question/' + questionId + '/answer/' + answerId; } else if (target.startsWith('article:')) { const match = target.match(/article:(\d+)/); const articleId = match ? match[1] : null; targetUrl = 'https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/' + articleId; targetKind = 'article'; } else if (target.includes('/question/') && target.includes('/answer/')) { const match = target.match(/\/question\/(\d+)\/answer\/(\d+)/); questionId = match ? match[1] : null; answerId = match ? match[2] : null; } else if (target.includes('zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/')) { const match = target.match(/\/p\/(\d+)/); const articleId = match ? match[1] : null; targetKind = 'article'; } return { targetUrl, targetKind, questionId, answerId }; }

async (intermediate) => { const target = '{{ target }}'; const execute = {{ execute }}; const targetKind = intermediate.targetKind; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).filter((node) => { const text = (node.textContent || '').replace(/\u200B/g, '').trim(); const isVoteBtn = node.className.includes('VoteButton'); const inCommentItem = Boolean(node.closest('[data-comment-id], .CommentItem')); return text.includes('赞同') && isVoteBtn && !inCommentItem; }); if (candidates.length === 0) return { status: 'error', outcome: 'missing', message: 'Like button not found', target_type: targetKind, target }; const btn = candidates[0]; const isLiked = btn.getAttribute('aria-pressed') === 'true' || btn.classList.contains('VoteButton--is-active') || btn.className.includes('is-active'); if (isLiked) return { status: 'success', outcome: 'already_applied', message: 'Already liked ' + targetKind, target_type: targetKind, target }; if (!execute) { return { status: 'success', outcome: 'preview', message: 'Like button found (not clicked - execute=false)', target_type: targetKind, target }; } btn.click(); await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1200)); const nowLiked = btn.getAttribute('aria-pressed') === 'true' || btn.classList.contains('VoteButton--is-active') || btn.className.includes('is-active'); if (nowLiked) return { status: 'success', outcome: 'applied', message: 'Liked ' + targetKind, target_type: targetKind, target }; return { status: 'error', outcome: 'unknown', message: 'Like click dispatched but state not verified', target_type: targetKind, target }; }

description: Like a Zhihu answer or article
name: Like

variables.name: target
variables.help: Zhihu target URL or typed target (answer:123:456 or article:123)
